data.body: d9aa MERGED to main (Gerrit #670 ps3 -> merged 03:17:42) and closed with signed completion-verifier attestation. Fixture present on origin/main (e23387fd1). Merge triggered branch CI on e23387fd1 (test.yml/codeql/eval/optionality/verify-identity) — watching. test.yml already went green on 1131b491b (flake a16d intermittent). Re-ran external-integration (29303295904) + terraform-drift (29303296963) on main for ground-truth on the two persistent reds — watching. Expectation: ext-int likely still red on an environmental ref-lock/live-service test; tf-drift red on real user_data drift (operator apply).
